tools.name: division
tools.code:
div a,b ->
  b == 0? -> 0
  a < b? -> 0
  else? -> 1 + div(a - b, b)

tools.name: abs
tools.code:
abs a,b ->
  a < b? -> b - a
  else? -> a - b

tools.name: max
tools.code:
max a,b ->
  a < b? -> b
  else? -> a

tools.name: min
tools.code:
min a,b ->
  a < b? -> a
  else? -> b

tools.name: modulo
tools.code:
mod a,b ->
  b == 0? -> 0
  a < b? -> a
  else? -> mod(a - b, b)

tools.name: puissance
